title: I Don't Want to Miss a Thing
why_this_song: I Don't Want to Miss a Thing by Aerosmith (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "Don't want to close my eyes"
Appears 21 times; first heard in: "Don't want to close my eyes"
Appears 19 times; first heard in: "'Cause I'd miss you, babe"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "And I don't want to miss a thing"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Don't want to close my eyes"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I don't want to miss a thing
'Cause even when I dream of you
The sweetest dream will never do
I don't want to close my eyes
I don't want to fall asleep
And I don't want to miss a thing

excerpts.text: While you're far away and dreaming
I don't want to miss one kiss
'Cause even when I dream of you

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "I Don't Want to Miss a Thing" was released in 1998. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "I Don't Want to Miss a Thing" foi lançada em 1998. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
